headline: Alphabet's $122 Billion SpaceX Bombshell Just Surfaced In A Routine Alaska Filing
summary: A routine regulatory filing in Alaska has pulled back the curtain on one of Alphabet Inc‘s most valuable hidden assets: a stake in SpaceX that could soon be worth roughly $122 billion. Rare Filing Reveals Hidden Ownership The disclosure comes from an annual requirement in Alaska, where companies operating in the state must list any shareholders holding 5% or more. SpaceX, still privately held and famously tight‑lipped about its ownership structure, rarely offers this level of visibility. Yet the

headline: Alphabet’s EU Data Sharing Fight Puts Search And AI Advantage To Test
summary: The European Commission has proposed that Google share core search ranking and query data with rival search providers under the Digital Markets Act. Alphabet, parent company of Google (NasdaqGS:GOOGL), is contesting the measures, which cover data that also underpins its AI models and chatbot products. The outcome could influence how much access third party search engines and AI chatbots gain to data that has historically sat within Alphabet's ecosystem. Alphabet's share price sits at...
